hero.headline:
No Shortcuts. No Skipped Steps. Just a
Perfect Pool.
hero.subheadline: Elite Pool Service takes the guesswork out of pool ownership. Every visit includes thorough cleaning, precise chemical balancing, and a detailed report sent straight to your phone — so you always know exactly what's happening with your pool.
checkmarks: Text alerts when we're on the way

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care Done Right,<br class="hidden md:block"> Every Single Visit
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to emergency green pool rescues, we handle every detail so you can enjoy a swim-ready pool without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Surface skimming, vacuuming, wall and tile brushing, basket emptying, and debris removal — every step, every visit, no shortcuts.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing & Testing
cards.description: Professional water chemistry testing and precise balancing every visit, with a detailed chemical report sent straight to your phone afterward.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp green? We'll transform it back to crystal-clear blue — often in a single visit. Fast response, guaranteed results.

cards.title: Filter Maintenance
cards.description: Cartridge cleaning, DE filter servicing, and sand filter maintenance to keep your filtration running at peak performance all year long.

cards.title: Salt Cell Inspection
cards.description: Thorough inspection and cleaning of salt water chlorination cells to maintain proper chlorine generation and extend your equipment's lifespan.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Alerts
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems diagnosed and repaired. We proactively alert you to issues before they become expensive problems.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Reach out for a free, no-pressure quote. We'll ask a few quick questions about your pool setup and have a custom plan ready within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up & Handle It All
steps.description: Our CPO-certified team arrives on schedule — you'll get a text when we're on the way. Every visit covers cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and a full report.

steps.title: Dive In, Stress-Free
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every day. Check your service reports, enjoy the water, and never worry about pool care again.

about.label: Why Clay County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, CPO Certified, and Obsessed with Getting It Right
about.description: Elite Pool Service was built on a simple promise: do the job right every time, no exceptions. As a family-owned company serving Clay County since 2019, we take a hands-on, no-shortcuts approach to every pool we touch. Our CPO-certified technicians are trained in-house, and every visit includes detailed chemical reporting and proactive equipment alerts — because we believe you deserve to know exactly what's happening with your pool.

features.title: Detailed Service Reports
features.description: After every single visit, you receive a complete chemical report and service summary. Full transparency, zero guesswork.

features.title: Proactive Equipment Alerts
features.description: We catch pump, filter, and heater issues during routine service and alert you before they become costly breakdowns.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no fine print. Just great pool service.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your pool. No contracts, no hidden fees — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "No Shortcuts" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not satisfied with a service visit, we'll come back and redo it at no charge — no questions asked. Every visit follows our full checklist, every chemical reading is documented, and every detail is reported to you. That's the Elite standard, and we stand behind it 100%.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Clay County are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response — just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and go about their day. After every visit, you'll receive a detailed service report and chemical summary so you know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What happens after each visit?
faqs.answer: You'll receive a text notification when our technician is on the way, and a full chemical report after the visit is complete. We believe in total transparency — you'll always know what was added and why.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team is CPO certified (Certified Pool Operator) and trained through our hands-on in-house program. Every technician follows our no-shortcuts checklist on every visit.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Fleming Island, Orange Park, Middleburg, Green Cove Springs, and all of Clay County, Florida. If you're nearby and not sure, just ask — we're happy to check.

testimonials.name: Peg G.
testimonials.text: Elite Pools took my green pool to blue in less than four hours. I left home and came back a few hours later and it was blue. I only wish I had hired them in the beginning of summer.

testimonials.name: Ben H.
testimonials.text: Elite Pool Service is definitely the best pool service around. These folks have a high standard of pool care and it shows in their work. We always get so many compliments on the pool. Zach has been great from the start and does a very good job cleaning our pool.

testimonials.name: Greystone K.
testimonials.text: Elite Pool has done a great job with my pool cleaning and maintenance. They alert me to any problems with equipment and their reporting gives me a clear picture of what they added to the pool.
